title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Spencer's Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
